title: helichrysum pagophilum
intro: Helichrysum pagophilum, also known as a species of the Helichrysum genus, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum pagophilum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum pagophilum is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
